name: Golgi Apparatus and ER Microsome Isolation
nameCn: 高尔基体与内质网微粒体分离

components.name: 1. Treat cells: Brefeldin A (5 µg/mL, 30 min) OR use untreated

note.en: For Golgi isolation: optional BFA pre-treatment reversal enriches Golgi by cycling blocks — actually skip BFA for isolation. Use ≥5×10⁷ cells (e.g., 3–4 × 15 cm plates). Work at 4°C throughout.
note.zh: 高尔基体分离：使用 ≥5×10⁷ 细胞（3–4 个 15 cm 皿）。全程 4°C 操作。

components.name: 2. Wash 2× cold PBS; scrape or trypsinize; pellet 400×g 5 min 4°C

note.en: Resuspend pellet in 1 mL homogenization buffer (250 mM sucrose, 10 mM HEPES pH 7.4, 1 mM EDTA, protease inhibitors; lysosome_isolation_buffer is suitable).
note.zh: 沉淀重悬于 1 mL 匀浆缓冲液（250 mM 蔗糖、10 mM HEPES pH 7.4、1 mM EDTA、蛋白酶抑制剂；lysosome_isolation_buffer 适用）。

components.name: 3. Homogenize: 15–20 Dounce strokes (tight pestle) on ice; verify ~80% lysis

note.en: Trypan blue test: >80% cells blue = adequate. Over-homogenization fragments Golgi cisternae.
note.zh: 台盼蓝验证 >80% 裂解。过度匀浆会使高尔基体膜碎裂成碎片。
核后上清（PNS）= 起始材料。

note.en: Removes mitochondria, lysosomes, heavy membranes. Supernatant enriched in Golgi and ER.
note.zh: 去除线粒体、溶酶体和重膜。上清富含高尔基体和内质网。

components.name: 6A. ER microsomes: high-speed spin 100,000×g 60 min 4°C; collect pellet

note.en: Total microsome pellet = rough ER (ribosome-decorated), smooth ER, Golgi vesicles, plasma membrane fragments. Resuspend in 0.5 mL buffer. Marker: Calnexin (rough ER), SERCA2 (ER Ca-ATPase), PDI (ER lumen).
note.zh: 总微粒体沉淀 = 粗面内质网（含核糖体）、光面内质网、高尔基囊泡、质膜碎片。0.5 mL 缓冲液重悬。标记蛋白：Calnexin（粗面 ER）、SERCA2（ER Ca-ATP 酶）、PDI（ER 腔）。

note.en: In SW-41 Ti tube (bottom to top): 2 mL 35% → 3 mL 25% → 3 mL 10% sucrose (all in 10 mM HEPES pH 7.4, 1 mM EDTA). Load 1 mL post-mitochondrial supernatant on top. Centrifuge 100,000×g 2 h 4°C. Golgi: 10/25% interface. Collect with Pasteur pipette.
note.zh: SW-41 Ti 管中（从底至顶）：2 mL 35% → 3 mL 25% → 3 mL 10% 蔗糖（均在 10 mM HEPES pH 7.4、1 mM EDTA 中）。顶部加 1 mL 线粒体后上清。100,000×g 2 h 4°C。高尔基体：10/25% 界面。Pasteur 吸管收集。

components.name: 7. Wash Golgi fraction: dilute 5× PBS; centrifuge 100,000×g 45 min 4°C

note.en: Remove sucrose. Resuspend pellet in small volume buffer for downstream assays.
note.zh: 去除蔗糖。重悬沉淀用于下游实验。

note.en: Golgi markers: GM130 (cis-Golgi), TGN46 (trans-Golgi). ER markers: Calnexin, GRP78/BiP. Negative: VDAC (mito), LAMP1 (lysosome). For IF: fix fraction on poly-L-lysine coated coverslip; standard if_protocol.
note.zh: 高尔基标记：GM130（顺式高尔基）、TGN46（反式高尔基）。ER 标记：Calnexin、GRP78/BiP。阴性：VDAC（线粒体）、LAMP1（溶酶体）。免疫荧光：将分级组分滴加至多聚赖氨酸包被盖玻片上固定，按 if_protocol 进行。

notes.en: Golgi is extremely fragile — 4°C is critical. Even brief RT exposure causes cisternal stacking disruption. Typical yield: 50–200 µg protein from 5×10⁷ cells. For ER: rough and smooth ER can be further separated by 1.0/1.3/1.5 M sucrose step gradient (rough ER pellets at 1.3/1.5 interface due to ribosome weight). Both organelles are highly susceptible to detergents — avoid.
notes.zh: 高尔基体极脆弱——必须在 4°C 操作，室温短暂暴露即可破坏膜堆叠结构。典型产量：5×10⁷ 细胞 50–200 µg 蛋白质。内质网：粗面和光面内质网可用 1.0/1.3/1.5 M 蔗糖梯度进一步分离（粗面 ER 因核糖体重量在 1.3/1.5 界面沉降）。两种细胞器均对去污剂高度敏感——避免使用。

ref: Graham (2002) Curr Protoc Cell Biol 3.9.1–3.9.24; Rabouille (1999) Methods Mol Biol 88:349–361; Bhatt et al. (2021) STAR Protoc 2:100450
